raw_output:
PR #139 security review (Claude, Fable 5). NO FINDINGS. Additive schema only, no new surface: no new endpoints, dependencies, raw SQL, or logging (T-16); export already contained HRV/stage-class health data (monthly weeks table) so no new data class leaves the app. T-04 escape invariant verified for every new hole in _night_html: weekday/bedtime/date/sleep_score/duration through _esc; deep/rem use :d and avg_hrv :.0f numeric specs (non-numeric raises, cannot inject); heading is a code literal; separator a literal entity; factor tags keep _esc. Mutation-worthy T-04 test: test_monthly_escapes_night_context_fields injects _XSS into both new string holes, asserts _XSS absent + exact count of 2 escaped occurrences — dropping _esc on either fails it; duration hole not injectable by construction (int//60 on a string raises).

--- Post-review delta ---
Fix round commit 2d32e28: C1 fixed — label 'slept' -> 'bed' in _night_html and SPA nightDetails (both surfaces read e.g. 'bed 11:42 PM'); C3 fixed — _night_summary docstring softened to 'render the same fields' (SPA abbreviates weekday; avg_hrv rounding may differ at .5). Test sentinels hardened: null-fields sentinel is now re.search(r'bed \d', html) is None — probed against real rendered HTML including the 'Pre-bed ritual' factor tag, which does NOT match, while the real label does. Delta scope: report_service.py, test_report_service.py, BestWorstNightsCard.tsx + test — all within the lane touch-set (BestWorstNightsCard substitution recorded in the wave plan). Post-fix verification: backend pytest 556 exit 0 (coverage 97.91%), mypy 0, ruff 0; frontend cold-cache lint 0, format:check 0, vitest 314/45 files exit 0, build 0.
